Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Application Related Questions

1. How do I apply for the residence permit?

Students enrolled in an academic program in Turkey for 3 months or longer are obliged to acquire a residence permit as per Foreigners’ Protection and Immigration Laws. You can fill the application form online, and then you need to deliver your papers in person. For more information, visit https://e-ikamet.goc.gov.tr/

2. What about the visa procedures?

Visa procedures are the responsibility of the candidates. It is very important to complete the documents requested by the consulate/embassy of the destination country during the visa application process.

3. How do I apply for the student travel card?

You can easily apply for the student travel card online. For more information click the link below: https://bireysel.istanbulkart.istanbul/

4. Are there any student accommodation opportunities at Istanbul Health and Technology University?

Currently Istanbul Health and Technology University does not have any accommodation facility. Please visit our website regularly for updates.

5. What kind of exchange programs are offered for students at Istanbul Health and Technology University?

Erasmus student exchange and mobility program are offered to our students.
